---
title: ""
output:
  html_document:
    toc: no
pagetitle: "Adelaide Tovar - Publications"
---

<link rel="stylesheet" href="styles.css" type="text/css">

# Publications

### Peer-Reviewed

1. LT Laudermilk, **A Tovar**, AK Homstad, JM Thomas, KM McFadden, MK Tune, DO Cowley, JR Mock, F Ideraabdullah, SNP Kelada. [Baseline and innate immune response characterization of a Zfp30 knockout mouse strain.](https://doi.org/10.1007/s00335-020-09847-z) *Mamm Genome*, 2020. (epub ahead of print)

2. **A Tovar**\*, GJ Smith\*, JM Thomas, WL Crouse, J Harkema, SNP Kelada. [Transcriptional profiling of the murine airway response to acute ozone exposure.](https://academic.oup.com/toxsci/article/173/1/114/5593669) *Toxicol Sci*, 2020. 173(1),114-130. \*co-first author

3. M Weiser, JM Simon, B Kochar, **A Tovar**, JW Israel, A Robinson, GR Gipson, MS Schaner, HH Herfarth, RB Sartor, DPB McGovern, R Rahbar, TS Sadiq, MJ Koruda, TS Furey, SZ Sheikh. [Molecular classification of Crohns disease reveals two clinically relevant subtypes.](https://gut.bmj.com/content/67/1/36.abstract) *Gut*, 2018. 67(1), 36-42.

### Preprints

1. GJ Smith, **A Tovar**, M Kanke, P Sethupathy, SNP Kelada. [Ozone-induced changes in murine lung extracellular vesicle number and small RNA content.](https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2020.06.17.157156v1) *bioRxiv*, deposited June 17, 2020.
